ModMetadata.Name: Storms Aimee Tweaker
ModMetadata.Author: StormCircuit
ModMetadata.Description: Mod to tweak aimee. aimeeSpeed (In m/s). Vanilla is 1.3 aimeeTorque (Unknown units). Vanilla is 0.01 aimeeStormDamage (In percent, 1 = 100%). Vanilla is 1 aimeeWindScale (In percent, 1 = 100%). Vanilla is 1 aimeeRepairSpeed (In percent, 1 = 100%, values over 1 appear to reset to 1.). Vanilla is 0.4 aimeeMiningDepth (In meters). Vanilla is 3 aimeeStuckTimer (In seconds). Vanilla is 60 aimeeStuckSpeed (In m/s). Vanilla is 0.1 aimeeSearchArea (In meters). Vanilla is 16
